# Bearing Freedom
> Second Amendment commentary and analysis

Bearing Freedom covers gun rights, legislation, and court cases with a focus on Virginia. The site publishes opinion and commentary articles based on original analysis from the Bearing Freedom YouTube channel.

## Content
- Articles: https://bearingfreedom.com/articles/
- Topics: https://bearingfreedom.com/topics/
- Videos: https://bearingfreedom.com/videos/
- RSS: https://bearingfreedom.com/rss.xml

## Topics covered
- Second Amendment law and litigation
- State gun legislation (Virginia focus)
- Supreme Court gun cases (Bruen, Heller, McDonald)
- Concealed carry and constitutional carry
- ATF policy and regulation
- Red flag laws
- Assault weapons bans

## Contact
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCmuwdcAbeBR16b8q6CBUsTw
- Website: https://bearingfreedom.com/contact
